case_title: ANATOLE DARMOUSSEH VS. PRATT & WHITNEY et al

docket_entries.description: ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR JUL-19-2011 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 610
NO APPEARANCE, NOR OBJECTION FILED. CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING MAY-14-2012 AT 2:00PM. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
